assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Response correctly uses 'no_upgrades' scope for BFCM period and explicitly notes it blocks patches, minor upgrades, AND node upgrades with 30-day maximum

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Response correctly uses 'no_upgrades' scope for June code freeze with proper gcloud command syntax

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to stop node upgrades. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: Response uses 'no_minor_or_node_upgrades' scope with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support flag and explains why this approach is recommended over just blocking minor versions

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Maximum 30 days per exclusion' for no_upgrades and explains the until-end-of-support behavior for the persistent exclusion

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: Response provides complete gcloud commands with correct --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for all three scenarios

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Maximum 3 "no upgrades" exclusions per cluster, with at least 48 hours available for maintenance in any 32-day window'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'If you run `gcloud container clusters upgrade` manually, it ignores all maintenance exclusions' and 'Manual Upgrades Bypass Exclusions'

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: While the response mentions security patch compliance and shows manual upgrade commands, it doesn't explicitly warn about the risks of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
